productName: A1 AI Core product research contract
guardrails: Keep the shared product research helpers deterministic and dependency-free.
Keep product eval configs narrow: repo-relative files only, one scalar metric, and ignored local results.
Keep result TSV rows spreadsheet-safe and stable for downstream product repos.
Keep the runner fail-closed on invalid metrics, out-of-scope dirt, dirty read-only files, and TSV header mismatches.
Do not add network calls, model calls, git mutations, or product-specific config to the pure helper layer.
